title: 3 John, Chapter 1
description: Complete text of 3 John chapter 1 from the King James Version (1611).
introduction: Complete text of 3 John chapter 1 from the King James Version (1611).

translation.original_text: <sup>1</sup>ο πρεσβυτερος γαιω τω αγαπητω ον εγω αγαπω εν αληθεια
translation.text: <sup>1</sup>The elder unto the wellbeloved Gaius, whom I love in the truth.
